[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011111110 7
1 110010011 5
2 110001111 6
3 100010111 5
4 110011011 6
5 101010111 6
6 001010101 4
7 011111110 7

34 43 011111111 8
45 54 111111111 a
56 65 110011111 7
67 76 110001111 6 match 2
70 07 110010111 6
